scripts.copy:public: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(__dirname,'client','dist');const dest=path.join(__dirname,'server','public');if(fs.existsSync(dest))fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Copied client/dist to server/public');"
scripts.build: npm run install:server && npm run install:client && npm run build:client && npm run copy:public
